name: Tuition Days
overview: Centers on math genius Tanay and mischievous friend Girgit navigating home tuition. New student Resham becomes Tanay's crush, stirring things up amidst big coaching center world.

trailers.title: Tuition Days | Official Trailer | Ft. Krutika Deo, Chirag Katrecha & Aaryan Prajapati | RVCJ Media
